title: Pricing
excerpt: description: D1 pricing based on rows read, rows written, and storage with scale-to-zero billing. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/d1/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. * **Usage**: Queries you run against D1 will count as rows read, rows written, or both (for transactions or batches). * **Scale-to-zero**: You are not billed for hours or capacity units. If you are not running queries against your database, you are not billed for compute.
